CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100047239) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SCOLA, SELENA JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 5.0 DAYS

LAW AND MOTION, DEPT. 302, THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANTS ISLAND PARK STORAGE AND BIZON GROUP, INC.'S DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF SELENA SCOLA'S COMPLAINT IS OFF CALENDAR FOR FAILURE TO MEET AND CONFER. (CODE CIV. PROC. SEC. 430.41.) CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 430.41 REQUIRES THE DEMURRING PARTY TO "MEET AND CONFER IN PERSON OR BY TELEPHONE" WITH THE PARTY WHO FILED THE COMPLAINT BEFORE A DEMURRER IS FILED. COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANTS FAILED TO FILE A DECLARATION TO INDICATE THAT SUCH A MEET AND CONFER EFFORT TOOK PLACE BEFORE HE FILED THE DEMURRER. THE PARTIES ARE ORDERED TO MEET AND CONFER IMMEDIATELY AND DEFENDANTS HAVE UNTIL SEPTEMBER 5, 2019 TO RESPOND TO THE COMPLAINT. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; NOT REPORTED. (302/EPS)

calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-09-2020 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-14-2020 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Dec-22-20 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-24-2019 Set For Trial On May-18-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-12-2019 Continued To Nov-06-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-05-2019 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

RULING: There being no appearance, the court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Defendants Island Park Storage and Bizon Group, Inc.'s demurrer to Plaintiff Selena Scola's complaint is off calendar for failure to meet and confer. (Code Civ. Proc. Sec. 430.41.) Code of Civil Procedure section 430.41 requires the demurring party to "meet and confer in person or by telephone" with the party who filed the complaint before a demurrer is filed. Counsel for Defendants failed to file a declaration to indicate that such a meet and confer effort took place before he filed the demurrer. The parties are ordered to meet and confer immediately and defendants have until September 5, 2019 to respond to the complaint.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-28-2019 Continued To Sep-25-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
